summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a beloved show, highlighted by a blistering second set featuring Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World, Ship of Fools, St. Stephen, Iko‑Iko, Not Fade Away and Sugar Magnolia.
review: Both reviewers rate this recording five stars, praising the clear board source that offers a fresh perspective on a show many fans hold dear. The second set is repeatedly called “stellar,” with seamless segues from Estimated Prophet into Eyes of the World, a standout Ship of Fools, and a magical flow through St. Stephen, Iko‑Iko, Not Fade Away and Sugar Magnolia.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (5/5) and enthusiastic comments about both performance and recording quality push the rating into the very good range; only two reviews limit confidence to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the board perspective adds clarity and a different vibe compared with audience tapes; no specific flaws mentioned, implying a clean, well‑balanced capture.

standout_songs: Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World
show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is described as seamless and tightly sequenced, with superb segues that make the performance feel like a continuous musical journey.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His lead work is highlighted as space‑y, "dark‑star‑like" during Not Fade Away and overall turn‑up in the second set.
